title: PanelType
text: PanelType Enables or disables the session panel, and controls its position. PanelType = On | No | Top | Left | Bottom | Right | Floating | Default value Floating File section [upi] Description When PanelType is set to No , the session panel is disabled and cannot be shown or hidden using the ^ATTRIBUTE structure editor function ( Gold X ). To enable the session panel, set it to any of the other values. If the setting is not present, the session panel is displayed as a floating panel. Note: In the default Uniface installation, PanelType in usys.ini is set to No . Related Links Panels Session Panel Specifies a panel that is available for the duration of the application session, even if a panel has been specified for the current component, or a toolbar definition exists.
